title: Fmag_Polarity Property
description: Sets or returns for resultant force whether the force trigger is activated or inactivated when values correspond to or do not correspond with threshold values.
notes: Fmag_Polarity returns the status of or sets whether the force trigger is triggered by either the resultant force being within the thresholds or the resultant force being outside of the thresholds.
see_also:
Applies To

Force Control

Force Trigger
examples:
Function SettingPolarity FSet FT1.Enabled, False, False, False, False, False, False, True, False FSet FT1.Fmag_Polarity, FG_OUT FSet FT1.Fmag_Levels, 0, 50 Trap 1, FT1 Call ForceError
Fend
